section_overrides.Intro: wide establishing anime frame with the protagonist small but clearly identifiable
section_overrides.Bridge: intimate close-up profile shifting to a three-quarter emotional reveal
section_overrides.Outro: slow pullback from the signature prop to the full silhouette

chorus_fast_shot: dynamic forward tracking shot, low angle, strong beat-synced foreground streaks
chorus_default_shot: forward tracking shot with widening background parallax and brighter rim light
mirror_shot: medium close-up reflected in a dark surface with neon fracture light framing the face

emotion_shots.sad: close-up profile or low-angle tilt down, shallow depth isolating the face
emotion_shots.lonely: wide static frame — small figure against large negative space
emotion_shots.loneliness: slow lateral dolly with strong silhouette against empty background
emotion_shots.angry: fast low-angle push-in with impact flash cuts
emotion_shots.defiant: strong low angle rising slowly toward the sky
emotion_shots.romantic: gentle orbit or soft push-in with warm shallow depth
emotion_shots.longing: slow zoom into a small detail, then pull back to full isolation
emotion_shots.anxious: slight handheld shake, tight crop frame
emotion_shots.peaceful: wide still frame or slow gentle overhead drift
emotion_shots.excited: dynamic lateral tracking with quick panning bursts
emotion_shots.bittersweet: medium profile with slow dolly and split-tone depth
emotion_shots.nostalgic: gentle push-in with shallow atmospheric depth
emotion_shots.hopeful: forward tracking shot into open space, upward angle

keyword_shots.shot: wide shot with strong negative space surrounding the figure
tight close-up on hands or face with soft neon rim light
dynamic low tracking shot with motion blur on background elements

default: medium shot with lyric-specific hand action and soft parallax background
